title: ophrys mammosa subsp. epirotica
intro: Ophrys mammosa subsp. epirotica, also known as Epirotic Ophrys, is a subspecies of orchid native to Greece and Albania. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and supporting immune function. Ophrys mammosa subsp. epirotica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
